notes: open-clause probe: capacity planning judgment; launch-day load is beyond code inspection but not security

messages.content: we got picked for a product hunt feature next thursday. traffic could be 50x normal for a day

Exciting. Current setup: one Railway instance, Postgres on the starter plan, no CDN on images. I can add caching headers, move images behind a CDN, and bump the instance size for the day. That covers the obvious multipliers.
will that actually hold though? I have no feel for what 50x does to a database or where things snap first. I get one shot at this and if the site dies on launch day that's it
